title: Getting Started with Python
description: What Python is, how to run it, and how to store and label data with variables and basic types.

lessons.title: What Python Is and Why It's Worth Learning
objectives: Explain in plain terms what Python is and what it's used for
Give three reasons Python is a strong first language
Recognise a simple Python program and what print() does

lessons.title: Installing and Running Python
objectives: Install Python 3 and confirm it from a terminal
Run code interactively in the REPL
Write and run a .py script file

lessons.title: Variables and Basic Types
objectives: Identify the core types: int, float, str, and bool
Build strings with f-strings and do basic arithmetic
Convert between types with int(), float(), and str()
